name: public-space-extraction-transform
description: Contract for transforming address data to extract and normalize public space names and types

output.target: transformed database with normalized public space tables

transformation_steps.description: Extract unique public space names and types from address data
operations: SELECT DISTINCT PublicSpaceName FROM Address WHERE PublicSpaceName IS NOT NULL
SELECT DISTINCT PublicSpaceType FROM Address WHERE PublicSpaceType IS NOT NULL

transformation_steps.description: Generate deterministic xxhash64 IDs for public space entities
operations: Generate xxhash64(PublicSpaceName) for each unique name
Generate xxhash64(PublicSpaceType) for each unique type
INSERT INTO PublicSpaceName (ID, PublicSpaceName) VALUES (hash_id, name)
INSERT INTO PublicSpaceType (ID, PublicSpaceType) VALUES (hash_id, type)

SELECT DISTINCT Settlement_ID, PublicSpaceName_ID, PublicSpaceType_ID FROM Address JOIN PublicSpaceName ON Address.PublicSpaceName = PublicSpaceName.PublicSpaceName JOIN PublicSpaceType ON Address.PublicSpaceType = PublicSpaceType.PublicSpaceType

transformation_steps.description: Update Address table with foreign key references
operations: UPDATE Address SET PublicSpaceName_ID = (SELECT ID FROM PublicSpaceName WHERE PublicSpaceName.PublicSpaceName = Address.PublicSpaceName)
UPDATE Address SET PublicSpaceType_ID = (SELECT ID FROM PublicSpaceType WHERE PublicSpaceType.PublicSpaceType = Address.PublicSpaceType)
UPDATE Address SET FullAddress = CONCAT(PublicSpaceName, ' ', HouseNumber)

data_quality_requirements.referential_integrity: All foreign keys must reference existing entities
data_quality_requirements.uniqueness: All PublicSpaceName and PublicSpaceType entries must be unique

error_handling.missing_foreign_keys: Use NULL values, log missing references
